Home / Services / Electrical Panel Upgrades

Electrical Panel Upgrades

Upgrade your electrical panel for increased capacity and enhanced safety in your Indianapolis home.

Is your electrical panel outdated or insufficient for your current electrical needs? SB Electrical Services provides expert electrical panel upgrades for homes and businesses in Indianapolis. An upgraded electrical panel can provide increased capacity to handle modern appliances and electronics, improve safety by preventing overloads, and ensure your electrical system meets current code requirements.

Many older homes in Indianapolis, particularly in neighborhoods like Broad Ripple and Meridian-Kessler, have outdated electrical panels that are no longer adequate for today's electrical demands. We can replace your old panel with a new, higher-capacity panel that can safely handle all your electrical needs. We also offer subpanel installations to provide additional circuits for specific areas of your home or business.

We handle all aspects of the electrical panel upgrade process, including obtaining permits, coordinating with the utility company, and ensuring the installation meets all applicable codes and regulations. We prioritize safety and quality in every project, ensuring your new electrical panel provides reliable and safe power for years to come.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Electrical Load Calculation: We'll assess your current and future electrical needs to determine the appropriate panel size.
  2. 02 Step 2: Permit Acquisition: We'll obtain all necessary permits from the City of Indianapolis.
  3. 03 Step 3: Panel Installation: Our licensed electricians will safely and efficiently install your new electrical panel.
  4. 04 Step 4: Inspection & Testing: We'll ensure the installation meets all code requirements and perform thorough testing.

Benefits

  • Increased Electrical Capacity
  • Improved Safety
  • Enhanced Home Value
  • Code Compliance

Frequently Asked Questions

How do I know if I need an electrical panel upgrade?

Common signs include frequently tripped breakers, flickering lights, and the inability to use multiple appliances simultaneously. If you experience these issues, it's time to consider an electrical panel upgrade.

How long does an electrical panel upgrade take?

The duration of an electrical panel upgrade typically ranges from 4 to 8 hours, depending on the complexity of the project. We'll provide you with a more accurate estimate during the consultation.

Do I need a permit for an electrical panel upgrade?

Yes, a permit is required for an electrical panel upgrade in Indianapolis. We'll handle the permit process for you, ensuring all work is compliant with local codes and regulations.

Get a Free Estimate
